caption: A person's hands are shown holding and displaying a sports trading card against a red and orange background featuring the logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". The person is wearing a ring on their left ring finger. Initially, they hold the card at an angle, then transition to holding it straight up, and finally hold it horizontally to show the back. The card features an image of basketball player Aaron Gordon, with text on the back including "NO. 33", "AARON GORDON", and "D.O.B. 10/18/1992". In the background of several frames, a smaller inset video shows a man with a beard wearing a black shirt, sitting in a room with white walls and shelving. The scene focuses on the tactile action of revealing the card's details to the camera.
